aboutData.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a passionate developer who loves building things for the web. With a focus on creating seamless user experiences and scalable architectures, I bring ideas to life through clean, efficient code.
When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or sharing what I've learned with the developer community.

whatIDo.title: FRONTEND
whatIDo.description: Building interactive, responsive, and performant user interfaces with modern frameworks and cutting-edge web technologies.

whatIDo.title: BACKEND
whatIDo.description: Designing scalable server-side architectures, RESTful APIs, microservices, and database systems for robust applications.

careerData.description: Leading frontend architecture and building scalable web applications with modern technologies.
Full-stack development with React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure. Shipped multiple production features.
Started career building web applications, learning best practices, and contributing to team projects.

projectsData.title: Project One
projectsData.description: A full-stack web application with real-time features.

projectsData.title: Project Two
projectsData.description: A SaaS platform with dashboard and analytics.

projectsData.title: Project Four
projectsData.description: A high-performance API service with caching.
